mapper.select:
SELECT user_id, target_type, target_id, status, create_time, update_time FROM likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
AND (
(target_type = #{t.targetType} AND target_id = #{t.targetId})
)
AND 1 = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO likes(user_id, target_type, target_id, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{it.userId}, #{it.targetType}, #{it.targetId}, #{it.status}, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = VALUES(status), update_time = NOW()
